expectations.text: Ran a database query filtering pipeline runs by FAILED status or recent timeframe
expectations.evidence: Investigated GitHub Actions CI/CD failures instead of video pipeline_run database records. Interpreted 'pipeline' as CI pipeline, not the video processing pipeline.

expectations.text: Displayed relevant details like IDs, steps, errors, and timestamps
expectations.evidence: Showed CI run details (workflow IDs, Terraform plan hangs) rather than pipeline_run table data

expectations.text: Checked CloudWatch logs for ERROR patterns or failure details
expectations.evidence: Did not check CloudWatch application logs. Only looked at GitHub Actions workflow logs.

expectations.text: Provided a clear summary categorizing failures with recommendations
expectations.evidence: Recommendations address CI/CD issues (job timeouts, lock-timeout) but miss the actual video pipeline failures entirely
